ranked_movies.title: The Thing
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently cited as a top horror film with a perfect ending and practical effects. Mentioned multiple times across different threads as a definitive and terrifying experience.

ranked_movies.title: Alien
ranked_movies.reason: Praised as a masterpiece and one of the scariest movies due to its believable sci-fi horror premise. Considered a top film by many users.

ranked_movies.title: The Exorcist
ranked_movies.reason: Described as a timeless classic that remains terrifying even after 50 years. Frequently recommended as one of the scariest horror films ever made.

ranked_movies.title: Hereditary
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a modern horror film that deeply disturbed viewers and left a lasting impact, particularly noted for its intense attic scene.

ranked_movies.title: The Descent
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted as a brilliantly terrifying film with a bleak ending. Recommended multiple times for its claustrophobic horror and effective scares.

ranked_movies.title: Sinister
ranked_movies.reason: Noted for its haunting soundtrack and ability to give viewers goosebumps. Considered one of the scariest modern horror films.

ranked_movies.title: It Follows
ranked_movies.reason: Praised for its unique and terrifying concept, with clever camera work that creates constant background tension. Highly recommended for its originality.

ranked_movies.title: The Ring
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned as a film that deeply disturbed viewers and caused sleepless nights. Considered a benchmark for psychological horror.

ranked_movies.title: Event Horizon
ranked_movies.reason: Described as a terrifying sci-fi horror film that left a strong impression on viewers. Compared to Dead Space for its atmospheric dread.

ranked_movies.title: The Wailing
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a definitive South Korean horror film with a complex and frightening narrative. Often cited in foreign horror discussions.

ranked_movies.title: Drag Me to Hell
ranked_movies.reason: Noted for its brutally unfair and memorable ending. Discussed for its bleak horror elements and effective curse storyline.

ranked_movies.title: The Blair Witch Project
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a groundbreaking found-footage film that terrified audiences with its realistic approach. Remembered for its innovative marketing and impact.

ranked_movies.title: Scream
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a fun and influential slasher film that revitalized the genre. Frequently recommended for its meta-commentary and entertainment value.

ranked_movies.title: Train to Busan
ranked_movies.reason: Praised as an excellent South Korean zombie film with emotional depth and intense action. Often recommended in foreign horror lists.

ranked_movies.title: The Autopsy of Jane Doe
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted as a slow-burn horror film with a terrifying atmosphere. Considered one of the scariest movies in recent years.

ranked_movies.title: REC
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a definitive Spanish horror film and one of the scariest found-footage movies. Frequently recommended for its intense pacing.

ranked_movies.reason: Noted for its fun and groovy horror-comedy elements. Recommended as a classic that balances scares with humor.

ranked_movies.title: The Babadook

ranked_movies.title: The Mist
